Text:
**Status:** PENDING_REVIEW
**Account type:** Faceless sleep/wellness ambient channel
**Platforms:** YouTube (long-form + Shorts), TikTok, Instagram, Spotify
**Voice:** Minimal. Atmospheric. Lowercase. No exclamation marks. Calm.
**Vibe:** 2am quiet. rain on glass. the hour between awake and asleep.

#relaxing #ambient #chill

**Post 1:**
your phone screen at 11pm is stealing 45 minutes of deep sleep. the blue light suppresses melatonin for 90 minutes after you stop scrolling. put it in another room. let the quiet do its work.

#chill #study #ambient

**Post 2:**
there's a version of tonight where you fall asleep in eight minutes. cold room. dark room. no screen. just your breathing and the weight of the blanket.

#relaxing #chill #ambient

**Post 3:**
the 4-7-8 breathing pattern. inhale 4 seconds. hold 7. exhale 8. three cycles. you'll feel it by the second one. your nervous system doesn't know how to stay anxious when you breathe like this.

#lofi #ambient #relaxing #study

**Post 4:**
no one talks about how good it feels to wake up before your alarm. not because you slept less. because your body finished on its own. that's what real rest feels like.

#study #relaxing #ambient #lofi

**Post 5:**
the rain doesn't care what time it is. it just falls. that's the energy for tonight. stop managing tomorrow. let it be 2am for a while.

#relaxing #study #chill #ambient #lofi

**Post 6:**
your bedroom has somewhere between 8 and 14 tiny lights you've never noticed. charger LEDs. router blinks. standby glow. every one of them is telling your brain it's still daytime. cover them. see what total darkness actually feels like.

#lofi #relaxing #chill

**Post 7:**
the best sleep aid costs nothing. same bedtime. same wake time. seven days a week. your body will start winding down on its own after two weeks. it just needs a pattern it can trust.

#lofi #chill #study #relaxing #ambient

**Post 8:**
some nights the only thing keeping you awake is the effort of trying to fall asleep. get up. sit somewhere dim. read something slow. go back when your eyelids get heavy. don't fight it. let it come to you.

#study #chill #ambient #relaxing #lofi

**Post 9:**
65 degrees. that's the temperature your body wants at night. it needs to drop two or three degrees to fall asleep. most bedrooms are set to 72. you're making your body work against itself every night.

#lofi #relaxing #chill #study #ambient

**Post 10:**
wind down. the last hour before sleep shouldn't look like the rest of your day. dim the lights. close the laptop. let the house get quiet. your brain needs a signal that the day is finished.

#study #relaxing #ambient

**Post 11:**
sleep is not a reward for finishing your to-do list. it's the thing that makes tomorrow's list possible. go to bed. the work will still be there.

#study #chill #ambient

**Post 12:**
the sound of rain on a window at 1am. a warm blanket in a cold room. nowhere to be until morning. some moments don't need improving. just staying in.

#chill #ambient #lofi

**Post 13:**
the military sleep method. relax your face. drop your shoulders. let your hands go limp. clear your mind for 10 seconds. if a thought comes, let it pass like a cloud. two minutes. most people are out by 120 seconds.

#relaxing #chill #ambient #lofi #study

**Post 14:**
you don't need to earn rest. you don't need to deserve quiet. tonight is not a negotiation. close your eyes. let the day end.

#study #relaxing #ambient

drop your shoulders as far as they go.
let your arms fall heavy.
breathe out. feel your chest sink.
clear your mind. ten seconds of nothing.
if a thought comes, let it drift past.
two minutes. most people don't make it to the end.

dim the lights. close the screens.
something warm to drink. something slow to read.
no alarms to set except one.
let the house go quiet.
this is how you tell your brain the day is done.

**Duration:** 24 seconds
**Visual:** Dark bedroom. Clock showing 3:00am. Slow zoom out. Window with moonlight.
**Voiceover:**

#ambient #study #chill #relaxing

3am wake-ups are usually one of three things.
cortisol spike from stress. you wake up with a racing mind.
blood sugar crash from a late meal. you wake up sweaty, heart pounding.
or your room is too warm and your body can't cool down.
figure out which one. fix the cause, not the symptom.

**Title:** rain on a cabin roof -- 10 hours -- no music -- dark screen
**Description:**
10 hours of steady rain falling on a wooden cabin roof. no music. no interruptions. no ads in the middle. just rain.

#relaxing #chill #lofi #ambient #study

for sleeping. for studying. for when you need the world to be quiet for a while.

#chill #study #lofi

recorded in a single continuous session. dark screen after 30 seconds so your room stays dark.

#study #chill #relaxing #lofi #ambient

if this helps you sleep, you don't need to tell me. just come back tomorrow night.

#chill #ambient #study #relaxing

**Tags:** rain sounds, rain for sleeping, cabin rain, 10 hours rain, sleep sounds, dark screen, no music, rain on roof, asmr rain, rain ambience, study sounds, relaxation, white noise rain, nature sounds for sleep, deep sleep sounds

#lofi #chill #ambient #relaxing #study

**Thumbnail concept:** Dark image of cabin roofline at night, rain visible as silver streaks against dark sky. Minimal text: "10 hrs" in small soft white font bottom corner. No bright colors. No faces. Moody, cinematic.

#lofi #relaxing #study #chill #ambient

**Production notes:**
- Generate base rain audio using Suno (prompt: "10 hours continuous heavy rain on wooden roof, no music, no thunder, consistent steady rainfall, ASMR quality") or Soundraw (rain ambient category)
- Layer 2-3 rain textures: primary roof rain + distant background rain + occasional gutter drip
- Use Mubert for ambient pad undertone (barely perceptible, just enough warmth)
- First 30 seconds: slow fade from cabin visual to solid dark screen (#0a0a0a, not pure black)
- Audio must loop seamlessly -- check crossfade points at 60-minute marks
- Export at 4K for YouTube quality signal, even though screen is dark
- Total file size will be large (8-12GB). Upload overnight.
- Monetize with mid-rolls OFF. Trust and return visits matter more than CPM on this one.

#chill #study #relaxing #lofi #ambient

**Title:** fireplace crackling -- 8 hours -- for sleep and focus -- dark screen
**Description:**
8 hours of a wood fireplace. no music. no talking. just the sound of logs shifting and flames breathing.

#chill #study #ambient #relaxing

#ambient #lofi #chill #study #relaxing

#lofi #study #relaxing

**Tags:** fireplace sounds, fireplace for sleeping, crackling fire, 8 hours fireplace, fire asmr, cozy sounds, winter ambience, dark screen fireplace, sleep sounds, study ambience, relaxing fire, wood burning, cabin fireplace, fire crackling asmr, focus sounds

#chill #ambient #relaxing #lofi #study

**Thumbnail concept:** Close-up of glowing embers, orange and amber tones, shallow depth of field. Everything else dark. Text: "8 hrs" small, bottom right, warm white font.

#chill #relaxing #study #lofi

**Production notes:**
- Generate base fireplace audio using Suno (prompt: "8 hours continuous wood fireplace crackling, no music, occasional log shift and pop, warm intimate close recording, ASMR quality")
- Layer: primary crackle + subtle room tone + occasional deep log settling sound
- Soundraw alternative: search ambient/nature category for fireplace base
- First 60 seconds: slow cinematic shot of fireplace (use stock footage from Pexels/Pixabay, commercial license), then fade to dark screen
- Dark screen color: #0d0805 (very slightly warm dark, not cold black)
- Avoid any sudden loud pops that could wake someone
- No mid-roll ads

#relaxing #study #lofi #ambient #chill

**Description:**
10 hours of ocean waves reaching shore and pulling back. recorded at night. no seagulls. no music. no surprises.

#relaxing #study #chill

the screen goes dark after 20 seconds. your room stays dark. the waves keep going.

#study #lofi #relaxing

for sleeping. for anxiety. for when your thoughts are too loud and you need something steady.

#chill #study #relaxing #lofi #ambient

**Tags:** ocean waves, ocean sounds for sleeping, 10 hours ocean, waves at night, black screen ocean, deep sleep sounds, beach waves, sea sounds, wave asmr, ocean white noise, calm ocean, nature sounds sleep, relaxation ocean, thalassotherapy sounds, nighttime waves

#chill #lofi #ambient #study #relaxing

**Thumbnail concept:** Dark ocean at night, barely visible horizon line, moon reflection on water as a thin silver line. Ultra minimal. Text: "10 hrs" bottom corner, cool white.

#relaxing #chill #ambient

**Production notes:**
- Generate base ocean audio using Suno (prompt: "10 hours continuous ocean waves on sandy beach at night, no seagulls, no music, rhythmic gentle waves, deep low-frequency, close microphone, ASMR quality")
- Layer: primary wave crash + receding water on sand + distant deeper waves + subtle wind
- Use Mubert to generate ultra-low ambient pad (sub-bass warmth, barely perceptible, adds depth)
- First 20 seconds: dark ocean footage (Pexels stock, nighttime beach), then fade to black screen
- Black screen: #050508 (very slightly blue-tinted black)
- Wave rhythm should be consistent -- avoid jarring variation
- No mid-roll ads
- Consider releasing a 1-hour version as a separate video for algorithm testing

#ambient #study #lofi #relaxing

**Duration:** 55 seconds
**Visual:** Dark, moody bedroom shots. Each "thing" gets a slow reveal with soft text overlay.
**Voiceover (calm, low, unhurried):**

#chill #lofi #study #ambient #relaxing

three things keeping you awake right now. and you can fix all of them tonight.

#chill #ambient #study #relaxing #lofi

one. your room is too bright. not the main light. the charger LED. the router. the standby glow on your TV. your brain registers all of it. cover every light source with tape. total darkness changes everything.

#relaxing #study #ambient #lofi

two. your body is too warm. sleep happens when your core temperature drops. 65 degrees. if your room is set to 72, your body is fighting to cool down all night. turn it down. add a blanket if you need to.

#lofi #relaxing #ambient #study #chill

three. your brain is still running. you didn't close the tabs. write down every thought, every worry, every tomorrow-task on paper. ten minutes. get it out of your head. your brain can stop holding it once it's written down.

#relaxing #chill #ambient #lofi
